creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
With my setup shown just above this comment.
I was able to overcome the watchdog timeouts,
and related problems by bumping up the values
of both
kern.ipc.nmbjumbop
and
kern.ipc.nmbclusters
In doing so I have had no issues at all for
more than 2 weeks.
IMHO the default values for these items are too
small. They should either have a larger default,
or become dynamic. Allowing them to self-adjust
according to the hardware involved.

HTH

--Chris
